entries.title: Commentary on Lamentations on lamentations 3:5
entries.excerpt: Second is the siege of those people already weakening. "He has besieged and enveloped me," Namely, the besieging army: "with bitterness and tribulation." That is, by an army that inflicts labor and bitterness on me. As Job 7:12 asks: "Am I the sea, or a sea monster, that thou settest a guard over me?"
